public_reputation: Known locally through day-to-day work as registrar.
manner: Thinks in testimony, signatures, and remembered sequence, even when everyone else wants to move faster. In Zootia, that reads as someone practical, supply-aware, and season-conscious, attentive to material reliability over display, and the habits of a registrar still shape how they handle timing, silence, and attention.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of registrar in and around Zootia Harvest Measures Board, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Zootia Harvest Measures Board workable through the obligations of registrar while managing the immediate pressure of institutional scrutiny in Zootia.
hidden_pressure: Must preserve sequence and custody even when powerful parties would prefer ambiguity. Around Zootia Harvest Measures Board, that usually means carrying institutional scrutiny, reputation risk, daily strain without letting the role of registrar visibly slip.

adventure_hooks.summary: Nella Fieldmere can trade precise, actionable information once the party secures or clarifies the record they protect.
Nella Fieldmere needs help resolving a missing ledger, inconsistent testimony, or tampered record tied to Zootia Harvest Measures Board.

support_scope_notes: Promoted from a preexisting named interface into the unified full-content NPC architecture. Sparse unsupported fields remain intentionally restrained.
public_signal: Seals, ledgers, or carefully bundled papers make record authority the first thing Nella Fieldmere communicates in public.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Zootia Harvest Measures Board: offices, toll points, ledgers, archives, or testimony desks
